## Meeting Purpose

[Second client interview with Maximiliano De Benedetto for Content Manager (SEO) role at GrowthX AI](https://fathom.video/share/z38YuGWsqqwzQSzwbKyFuCMzQihroJtj?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX AI uses a pod structure: Managing Editor (pod lead), Content Managers (1-2 accounts), and freelance writers](https://fathom.video/share/z38YuGWsqqwzQSzwbKyFuCMzQihroJtj?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [Role involves content creation, keyword research, strategy development, and execution for B2B SaaS clients](https://fathom.video/share/z38YuGWsqqwzQSzwbKyFuCMzQihroJtj?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [Ideal candidate: Strong content background, SEO exposure, curiosity, and adaptability to AI-driven workflows](https://fathom.video/share/z38YuGWsqqwzQSzwbKyFuCMzQihroJtj?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [Company transitioning: Kyle moving to sales, Matthew (new CCO) to take over some responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/z38YuGWsqqwzQSzwbKyFuCMzQihroJtj?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX AI Team Structure and Evolution

  - [Shifted from account manager model to pod structure in December](https://fathom.video/share/z38YuGWsqqwzQSzwbKyFuCMzQihroJtj?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Pods: Managing Editor (lead), Content Managers, freelance writers](https://fathom.video/share/z38YuGWsqqwzQSzwbKyFuCMzQihroJtj?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [Recently added Director layer to oversee multiple pods](https://fathom.video/share/z38YuGWsqqwzQSzwbKyFuCMzQihroJtj?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [Considering 1-2 accounts per Content Manager for deeper engagement](https://fathom.video/share/z38YuGWsqqwzQSzwbKyFuCMzQihroJtj?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [48+ clients across 10+ pods](https://fathom.video/share/z38YuGWsqqwzQSzwbKyFuCMzQihroJtj?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)

### Content Manager Role and Responsibilities

  - [Generate content using AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/z38YuGWsqqwzQSzwbKyFuCMzQihroJtj?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [Conduct keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/z38YuGWsqqwzQSzwbKyFuCMzQihroJtj?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Analyze competitive landscape](https://fathom.video/share/z38YuGWsqqwzQSzwbKyFuCMzQihroJtj?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Develop and execute content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/z38YuGWsqqwzQSzwbKyFuCMzQihroJtj?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [Partner with Managing Editor and Director](https://fathom.video/share/z38YuGWsqqwzQSzwbKyFuCMzQihroJtj?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [Adapt traditional content skills to AI-driven processes](https://fathom.video/share/z38YuGWsqqwzQSzwbKyFuCMzQihroJtj?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)

### Client Base and Objectives

  - [Primarily B2B SaaS companies, some with AI focus](https://fathom.video/share/z38YuGWsqqwzQSzwbKyFuCMzQihroJtj?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Clients seek increased organic traffic and lower customer acquisition costs](https://fathom.video/share/z38YuGWsqqwzQSzwbKyFuCMzQihroJtj?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)
  - [GrowthX AI's value prop: Speed and cost-effectiveness of content production](https://fathom.video/share/z38YuGWsqqwzQSzwbKyFuCMzQihroJtj?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)

### Maximiliano's Background

  - [Bachelor's in journalism and communications](https://fathom.video/share/z38YuGWsqqwzQSzwbKyFuCMzQihroJtj?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [Experience in B2B sector, internal/external communications](https://fathom.video/share/z38YuGWsqqwzQSzwbKyFuCMzQihroJtj?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Transitioned to marketing and content creation \~8-10 years ago](https://fathom.video/share/z38YuGWsqqwzQSzwbKyFuCMzQihroJtj?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Multilingual: Spanish, English, Portuguese](https://fathom.video/share/z38YuGWsqqwzQSzwbKyFuCMzQihroJtj?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [Notable roles: Community Manager for SanDisk/Western Digital (LATAM), Content Manager for AI-focused ad agency](https://fathom.video/share/z38YuGWsqqwzQSzwbKyFuCMzQihroJtj?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Current: Content Manager for Black Dragon (private equity) and its fintech portfolio](https://fathom.video/share/z38YuGWsqqwzQSzwbKyFuCMzQihroJtj?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)

### Desired Candidate Qualities

  - [Strong content background with SEO exposure](https://fathom.video/share/z38YuGWsqqwzQSzwbKyFuCMzQihroJtj?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [Intellectual curiosity and proactivity](https://fathom.video/share/z38YuGWsqqwzQSzwbKyFuCMzQihroJtj?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
  - [Ability to adapt skills to AI-driven workflows](https://fathom.video/share/z38YuGWsqqwzQSzwbKyFuCMzQihroJtj?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
  - [Comfortable with ambiguity and continuous learning](https://fathom.video/share/z38YuGWsqqwzQSzwbKyFuCMzQihroJtj?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule follow-up interview with Matthew, new Chief Content Officer](https://fathom.video/share/z38YuGWsqqwzQSzwbKyFuCMzQihroJtj?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
  - [Explore Maximiliano's fit for the role, considering his diverse background and adaptability](https://fathom.video/share/z38YuGWsqqwzQSzwbKyFuCMzQihroJtj?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
  - [Assess Maximiliano's curiosity and ability to integrate AI into content processes](https://fathom.video/share/z38YuGWsqqwzQSzwbKyFuCMzQihroJtj?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
